intended_use: DS Core Diagnosis is a software product for use in dentistry for viewing and interacting with digital or digitized patient media as well as supporting the diagnosis of digital and digitized patient me
intended_use_full: DS Core Diagnosis is a software product for use in dentistry for viewing and interacting with digital or digitized patient media as well as supporting the diagnosis of digital and digitized patient media. Intended users will be able to view and analyze different media types in one viewer. The Panoramic Curve Proposal feature is intended for patients aged 12 years and older with permanent dentition.
target_condition: CBCT scan analysis and panoramic curve reconstruction for dental imaging
ground_truth: Expert clinical evaluation by dental clinicians assessing clinical acceptability of reconstructed CBCT panoramic images
other_metrics: Panoramic Curve Proposal Success Rate (PCPSR) for Dentsply Sirona scans: 98.81% (95% CI lower bound 94.57%); PCPSR for all scans (Dentsply Sirona and third-party): 99% (99 of 100 scans successful, 95% CI lower bound 95.42%); subgroup analysis PCPSR range 97.78-100%; expert clinical evaluation pass rate 92.5% for primary endpoint
